_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code. HBP 1.0 code: S700158; HBP 2.0 code: SU064A. SU064A is used as the primary procedure code.
procedure_name: Emergency management of Acute retention of Urine
source_files: Emergency management of Acute retention of Urine_Medco.pdf
Emergency management of Acute retention of Urine_PPD.CPD.pdf

preauth.label: Detailed Clinical notes with history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings and advice for admission

claim.label: Detailed procedure notes with documentation of evidence of simple catheterization and details of how much urine drained

ppd_preauth.q: Was detailed clinical notes (all vitals, detailed history, symptoms, signs, physical examination including local examination, indication for procedure, planned line of treatment) are submitted?
Was the USG abdomen suggestive of any condition suggestive of urine retention?

cpd_claim.q: Was the Detailed procedure and Evidence of simple catheterization and details of how much urine drained submitted?

common_queries: USG abdomen report not suggestive of urine retention, despite clinical presentation.
Detailed clinical notes (history, symptoms, signs, examination findings, advice for admission) missing or incomplete at pre-authorization.
USG abdomen report not submitted at pre-authorization.
Detailed indoor case papers missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Detailed procedure notes or evidence of simple catheterization, including details of urine drained, missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Detailed Discharge Summary missing or incomplete at claim submission.

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MCh/DNB or equivalent in (Urology, Pediatric surgery)
